Lightweight Charts
==================

This directory vendors the official TradingView Lightweight Charts standalone
production build so the static app can render line and candlestick charts
without a JavaScript build step or runtime CDN dependency.

- Package: lightweight-charts
- Version: 5.2.0
- Source: https://www.npmjs.com/package/lightweight-charts
- Build file: dist/lightweight-charts.standalone.production.js
- License: Apache-2.0, see LICENSE

Lightweight Charts is created by TradingView:
https://www.tradingview.com
